headline: AI21 Labs developer advocate helping teams build production RAG, agents, and LLM systems
title: Senior Developer Advocate
confidenceNote: AI21, LinkedIn, DevNetwork, and teaching profiles consistently identify Yuval Belfer as a senior developer advocate at AI21 Labs focused on RAG, agents, and production GenAI.
bioMarkdown: Senior Developer Advocate at AI21 Labs working across RAG, agents, and production LLM systems. Useful match for teams comparing retrieval architectures, agent design, and practical GenAI deployment patterns.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Public profile connects Yuval Belfer to AI21 Labs and LLM, RAG, and AI-agent work.

primary.label: AI21 World's Fair event page
primary.note: AI21 names Yuval Belfer as Senior Developer Advocate and describes his RAG-focused World's Fair talk.

primary.label: AI21 blog author page
primary.note: AI21 article credits Yuval Belfer as Senior Developer Advocate and Technical Product Marketing at AI21.

secondary.label: DevNetwork advisory profile
secondary.note: Profile describes him as AI21 Labs Senior Developer Advocate specializing in LLMs, RAG systems, and AI agents.

secondary.label: Nebius Academy team page
secondary.note: Teaching profile identifies Yuval as an AI21 Labs developer advocate involved in NLP and generative AI education.

headline: Neo4j AI research engineer building GraphRAG, knowledge-graph, and agent-context systems
title: AI Research Engineer
confidenceNote: LinkedIn, Neo4j, NVIDIA, GitHub, and AI Engineer sources consistently connect Zach Blumenfeld to Neo4j AI/ML graph work, GraphRAG, and agentic knowledge-graph systems.
bioMarkdown: AI Research Engineer at Neo4j focused on GraphRAG, knowledge graphs, and context layers for agents. Strong match for conversations about graph-backed retrieval, decision traces, entity resolution, and AI data readiness.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Public profile lists Zach Blumenfeld at Neo4j, building AI and data-science capabilities.

primary.label: Neo4j GraphRAG post
primary.note: Neo4j article credits Zach Blumenfeld as AI Research Engineer at Neo4j for GraphRAG work.

primary.note: GitHub profile and repositories show Neo4j Aura Agent, GraphRAG, and knowledge-graph AI demos.

secondary.label: NVIDIA author profile
secondary.note: NVIDIA identifies him as an AI/ML graph specialist at Neo4j with expertise in GraphRAG and agentic systems.

secondary.note: Coverage summarizes his AI Engineer talk on decision traces and context graphs for agents.

headline: GLG strategy leader applying consulting and psychology research background to expert-insight products

headline: Warp founder building an agentic development environment and software-factory workflows
title: Founder and CEO
confidenceNote: Public sources strongly identify Zach Lloyd as Warp's founder and CEO, while the attendee row listed AI Engineer; this profile uses the public title and treats the attendee title as role context.
bioMarkdown: Founder and CEO of Warp, building developer tooling for agentic software work. Good match for discussions about cloud coding agents, terminal-based workflows, skill loops, and managing software-factory throughput.

secondary.note: Interview profiles Warp founder Zach Lloyd and his AI-first engineering practices.
